runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 4th over 352m at Q Lakeside beaten 6 lengths (20.27) behind Pass Me Not in a P5 on April 1. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 5 on March 16 over 300m at this track behind Lucora beaten 4.5 lengths (16.87). Capable of taking this out.

runners.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fifth (20.20) at Q Lakeside over 352m. Must be included.
